labels.value: > chromium > flipcartJsonDataDriven.spec.ts > json dd test > each record 1

titlePath: > chromium > flipcartJsonDataDriven.spec.ts > json dd test > each record 1

steps.name: Expect "soft toBeVisible" getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Search for products, brands and more' })
Expect "soft toBeEnabled" getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Search for products, brands and more' })
Wait for selector getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Search for products, brands and more' })
Fill "LedTv" getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Search for products, brands and more' })
Wait for selector getByText('Login', { exact: true }).first()
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Request OTP' })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'Request OTP' })
